access_token.description: SurveySparrow access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: SurveySparrow API base URL override for tests or proxies.

survey_id.description: SurveySparrow survey ID that the 'questions' stream is scoped to (required for that stream; sent as the required survey_id query parameter on GET /v3/questions per the real documented API -- NOT a path segment). Not required for any other stream.
